hooks.command: WORKTREE_BRANCH="$(git rev-parse --abbrev-ref HEAD 2>/dev/null || true)" && cd "$(git rev-parse --git-common-dir 2>/dev/null)/.." && WORKTREE_BRANCH="$WORKTREE_BRANCH" bash scripts/hooks/session-start-check.sh

WORKTREE_BRANCH="$(git rev-parse --abbrev-ref HEAD 2>/dev/null || true)" && cd "$(git rev-parse --git-common-dir 2>/dev/null)/.." && WORKTREE_BRANCH="$WORKTREE_BRANCH" bash scripts/hooks/main-branch-block.sh

WORKTREE_BRANCH="$(git rev-parse --abbrev-ref HEAD 2>/dev/null || true)" && cd "$(git rev-parse --git-common-dir 2>/dev/null)/.." && WORKTREE_BRANCH="$WORKTREE_BRANCH" bash scripts/hooks/stop-check.sh
